description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsTapering toed sandal in beige with olive green elasticated forefoot and midfoot straps (that loop around the ankle)Mini heel with a plastic heel patchTPU outsole with patterned groovesHeel: 2"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
